rule_sets.name: QSHS Fence Rules
rule_sets.description: Data-driven QSHS horizontal slat fence BOM rules v4.1

rule_versions.notes: Initial QSHS rules based on CTS V4.1 formulas

product_constraints.name: max_panel_width_mm
product_constraints.message: Panel width above 2600mm is not supported; split into additional panels.

product_constraints.name: min_panel_width_mm
product_constraints.message: Panel width must be at least 300mm.

product_constraints.name: max_target_height_mm
product_constraints.message: Height above 2400mm; verify post specification for wind load.

product_constraints.name: post_size_enum
product_constraints.message: Post size must be 50mm or 65mm HD

product_constraints.name: post_65hd_no_p_pb
product_constraints.message: 65mm HD posts are not available in Primrose or Paperbark. Use 50mm post for these colours.

product_variables.name: slat_gap_mm
product_variables.label: Slat Gap
product_variables.notes: QuickScreen gap options: 5, 9, 12, 15, 20, 30mm. Spacer SKU suffix map: 5→05MM, 9→09MM, 12→12MM, 15→15MM, 20→20MM, 30→30MM.

product_validations.name: panel_width_in_range
product_validations.message: Panel width must be between 300mm and 2600mm.

product_rules.name: num_slats
product_rules.notes: Slats per panel. Uses ceil so height target is met or exceeded.

product_rules.name: actual_height_mm
product_rules.notes: Actual panel height after slat count is locked

product_rules.name: sf_cut_mm
product_rules.notes: Side frame cut = actual height - 3mm lip

product_rules.name: panel_width_mm
product_rules.notes: QSHS slats face-mount onto posts — panel width is the clear face-to-face span. System post material: num_posts * post_size_num. End and intermediate non-system post material injected by engine.

product_rules.name: slat_cut_mm
product_rules.notes: For QSHS face-mount: slat cut length equals the panel width (no slot insertion deduction needed)

product_rules.name: num_csr
product_rules.notes: CSR thresholds: 0 if <2000mm, 1 if 2000–3999mm, 2 if 4000–5999mm, 3 if >=6000mm

product_rules.name: csr_cut_mm
product_rules.notes: CSR cut = actual height - 6mm

product_rules.name: num_sf_left
product_rules.notes: 1 side frame on left if system-post termination, 0 if wall/join

product_rules.name: num_sf_right
product_rules.notes: 1 side frame on right if system-post termination, 0 if wall/join

product_rules.name: num_fsec_left
product_rules.notes: 1 F-section on left if wall termination, 0 otherwise

product_rules.name: num_fsec_right
product_rules.notes: 1 F-section on right if wall termination, 0 otherwise

product_rules.name: gap_code
product_rules.expression: slat_gap_mm == 0 ? "00MM" : slat_gap_mm == 5 ? "05MM" : slat_gap_mm == 9 ? "09MM" : slat_gap_mm == 12 ? "12MM" : slat_gap_mm == 15 ? "15MM" : slat_gap_mm == 20 ? "20MM" : "30MM"
product_rules.notes: Maps slat_gap_mm to spacer SKU suffix. 0mm = no spacers (qty will be 0).

product_rules.name: sf_stocks
product_rules.notes: Stock length 5800mm; ROUNDUP to whole stock lengths

product_rules.name: slat_cuts_per_stock
product_rules.notes: How many slat cuts fit in one 6100mm stock length

product_rules.name: slat_stocks
product_rules.notes: Total slat stock lengths across all panels in segment

product_rules.name: csr_stocks
product_rules.notes: Total CSR stock lengths across all panels in segment

product_rules.name: sfc_qty
product_rules.notes: 2 caps per side frame, sold individually (QS-SFC-B only in black)

product_rules.name: csr_cap_qty
product_rules.notes: 1 CSR cap per CSR per panel

product_rules.name: csr_plate_qty
product_rules.notes: 2 XP-BTP per CSR per panel (top + bottom)

product_rules.name: spacer_packs
product_rules.notes: 2*(slats+1) spacers per panel; 50-pack. 0 if no gap (slat_gap_mm=0).

product_rules.name: screw_packs
product_rules.notes: slats*2*1.01 + CSR screws per panel across all panels, in 50-packs

product_rules.name: fsec_screw_qty
product_rules.notes: MAX(3, ROUNDUP((height-30)/900+1)) * 2 per F-section

product_rules.name: emit_sf
product_rules.notes: Side frame stock lengths; companion rule adds CFC automatically

product_rules.name: num_posts
product_rules.notes: Engine provides product_post_boundary_count = number_of_panels + 1 for straight runs; corner posts already counted

product_rules.name: emit_post_50_2400
product_rules.notes: 50mm full post 2400mm for screens up to 2400mm tall

product_rules.name: emit_post_50_6000
product_rules.notes: 50mm full post 6000mm (cut to size) for screens over 2400mm

product_rules.name: emit_post_65_2400
product_rules.notes: 65mm HD post 2400mm for screens up to 2400mm — not available in P/PB

product_rules.name: emit_post_65_6000
product_rules.notes: 65mm HD post 6000mm (cut to size) for screens over 2400mm — not available in P/PB

product_rules.name: emit_spacer
product_rules.notes: Spacer packs; SKU resolved by selector using gap_code

product_rules.name: emit_screws
product_rules.notes: Screw packs (50 per pack); single SKU, no colour variant

90mm horizontal slat; colour resolved at runtime
